title: Error on "rank() over (order by sum(.."
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE student_scores (student_id Int32, subject String, score Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY student_id;
SELECT student_id, SUM(score) AS total_score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(score) DESC) AS rank FROM student_scores GROUP BY student_id;
key_bug_features: Using alias in rank() over clause causes error
